models.description: LGBM — raw return rank target, walk-forward CV (folds through fold 95), train_cutoff 2025-12-07. WFCV IC 0.3185, hit rate ~61%. Champion.
LGBM — quality-adjusted composite rank target, walk-forward CV (folds through fold 95), train_cutoff 2025-12-07. WFCV IC 0.2159. Candidate.
LGBM — momentum-cohort filter (27%), 63d market-excess rank target, retrained on new dataset. WFCV IC 0.0733 (57 folds), test IC 0.1397, backtest top-decile 29.53% ann / Sharpe 6.82. Candidate.
LSTM h256-L2 — clip target, walk-forward CV (6 folds, EMA 180d) + 53-anchor finetune, dataset through 2026-03-26. Mean WFCV IC-63d 0.1343. Candidate.
LGBM binary classifier — P(forward_63d > 20%). Momentum cohort, 57 WFCV folds. Mean P@10 0.325. Surfaced as breakoutProb_20pct_63d, not blended into MLScore.

LGBM binary classifier — P(forward_252d > 100%). Momentum cohort, 49 WFCV folds. Mean P@10 0.400 (4 of 10 top picks return >100% in 1y vs 5.7% base rate). Multi-bagger detector. Surfaced as breakoutProb_100pct_252d.
LGBM binary classifier — P(forward_252d > 50%). Momentum cohort, 49 WFCV folds. Mean P@10 0.496 (5 of 10 top picks return >50% in 1y vs 13.1% base rate). Surfaced as breakoutProb_50pct_252d.
LGBM — raw return rank target, 21d horizon. Retired: rank-correlation with 63d champion is 0.933 — no additive signal.
LGBM — composite rank target, 21d horizon. Retired: rank-correlation with 63d champion is 0.906 — no additive signal.
LGBM — momentum-cohort filter (27%), 63d market-excess rank target. WFCV IC 0.0843. Retired in favour of cohort_v3 (newer dataset).
LGBM — momentum-cohort filter (27%), 63d market-excess rank target. WFCV IC 0.1088. Retired in favour of cohort_v3.
LGBM binary classifier — P(forward_63d > 30%). Mean P@10 0.189. Retired in favour of v2 (>20%, P@10 0.325).
LGBM — raw return rank target, 7y dataset. WFCV IC 0.146, test IC 0.314. Retired in favour of v10.
LGBM — quality-adjusted composite rank target, 7y dataset. WFCV IC 0.150, test IC 0.240. Retired in favour of v10.
LGBM — raw return rank target, 10y dataset. IC 0.180. Retired.
LGBM — composite target, 10y dataset. IC 0.171. Retired.
LSTM h256-L2 — clip target, walk-forward CV (6 folds). Mean WFCV IC-63d 0.197. Retired in favour of v3.
Set Transformer — sector-relative rank target, cross-stock attention. Test IC 0.141. Retired pending CPU optimization.
